text.title: Junior AI Co-Pilot Curriculum Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Junior AI Co-Pilot Curriculum output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: verbatim prompt junior uses on own PRs

forbidden.pattern: pair_cadence missing OR with AI in the loop

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: baseline_week_1 populated with a typed value
explanation_required_threshold populated with a typed value
self_review_prompt populated with a typed value
pair_cadence populated with a typed value
week_12_assessment populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
